title: iammojogo's Village Life Plus
description: Smarter villagers and iron golems - auto-repopulation, fence gate navigation, personal space, and golems that actually protect villagers with intelligent combat AI.
body:
VillageLife Plus is a Minecraft mod that enhances village life with smarter Iron Golems and improved villager behavior.

I have been so busy lately but I PROMISE to make some updates asap and EVEN create a NEOFORGE, and FABRIC version!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! I know most players don't even know forge still works lol

CURRENTLY UPDATING:: - Structural AI development. A full-on structural creation system utilizing the nitwits as builders in villages since they dont have jobs :P. This will include 280 structures by the end of this added module! 01/12/2026


### Golem AI:
- Custom Iron Golem AI with intelligent pathfinding
- Golems actively patrol and protect village boundaries
- Villagers call for help when attacked - golems respond!
- Golems prioritize threats and defend villagers from hostile mobs
- Improved village boundary awareness
- 
### 👥 Villager Improvements
- **Personal Space** - Villagers no longer stack and bunch up in corners
- **Fence Gate Navigation** - Villagers can open and close fence gates
- **Pressure Plate Avoidance** - Villagers won't trigger your traps (configurable)

### 🏘️ Village Sustainability
- **Auto-Repopulation** - When population drops below 2, a new villager spawns nearby
- **Emergency Mode** - New Villager spawn when village hits 0 villagers (prevents village deletion)
- **Works Everywhere** - Vanilla villages, mod villages, and player-created villages

### ⚙️ Configuration - Currently Dev Mode Only
- In-game config GUI (no restart required)
- DEV_MODE for debug visualizations
- Toggleable features

## Planned Features
- Early shelter seeking (before sunset)
- Attack alerts for players
- Villager name tags showing profession
- Villager torch placement in dark areas
- Structural AI development

🔧 COMPATIBILITY

Works with JEI, JourneyMap, Xaero's Minimap, Optifine, and most client-side mods.

Requirements:

    Minecraft 1.12.2
    Forge 14.23.5.2859+
    Client-side only (no server installation needed)

📝 LICENSE

MIT License - Free to use, modify, and redistribute

🐛 FOUND A BUG?

Report issues to iammojogo@outlook.com!

💡 CREDITS

Developer: iammojogo Built with Minecraft Forge

Download now and take control of your villages! 🏘️
